feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 11, 07:00 - 10:10 UTC

Jul 3, 07:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in racks G124B07, G124B14, G124B19, G124B21, G125B02, G125B03, G125B18, G125B21 and G125B22.

Start time : 11/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 11/08/2026 10:10 UTC

List of concerned racks:
- Rack G124B07
- Rack G124B14
- Rack G124B19
- Rack G124B21
- Rack G125B02
- Rack G125B03
- Rack G125B18
- Rack G125B21
- Rack G125B22

Service impact : Public networks will be temporarily unavailable for 30 seconds during the maintenance for servers located in the specified racks.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 06:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jun 25, 18:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 27/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/07/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.content:

Jun 22, 16:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack YYZ0101B02A
- Rack YYZ0101B02A


Start time : 08/07/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 13:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

Start time : 03/07/2026 08:46 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 11:48 UTC

Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

entry.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack WAW0107A01A incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 3, 05:27 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 03/07/2026 00:51 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 05:04 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 3, 03:31 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The majority of the servers in rack WAW0107A01A are no longer impacted by the incident.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently working on the last impacted servers in the specified rack.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 3, 02:55 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack WAW0107A01A.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/07/2026 00:51 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack WAW0107A01A are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 3, 00:59 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary issue in the rack WAW0107A01A.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/07/2026 00:51 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack WAW0107A01A are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification

Jul 3, 02:10 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 2, 23:30 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 16, 21:01 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in GRA1.

List of concerned racks :
- G107A04
- G107A05
- G107A06

- G108A04
- G122B12
- G122B13
- G122B14

Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be performing maintenance on a network device.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks T01C48/T01C49/T01C50/T01C51/T01C52/T01C53/T01C54 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 2, 21:45 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on racks T01C48/T01C49/T01C50/T01C51/T01C52/T01C53/T01C54 has been resolved.

Start time : 01/07/2026 08:11 UTC
End time : 02/07/2026 20:36 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 2, 18:40 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affects your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : All servers in Racks T01C49, T01C50, T01C51, T01C52 and T01C54 are once again operational.
Some servers in Rack T01C53 are still temporarily unavailable.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently working on the last impacted servers.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 2, 03:11 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affects your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The majority of the servers in racks T01C49, T01C50, T01C51, T01C52, T01C53 and T01C54 are no longer impacted by the incident.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently working on the last impacted servers.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 1, 23:33 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affects your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : All servers in rack T01C48 are no longer impacted by this incident.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently working on the last impacted servers in the other racks.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 1, 08:29 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks T01C48/T01C49/T01C50/T01C51/T01C52/T01C53/T01C54.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 01/07/2026 08:11 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the racks T01C48/T01C49/T01C50/T01C51/T01C52/T01C53/T01C54 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G103B18 maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jul 2, 18:11 UTC
Completed - All services are operational.

Jul 2, 06:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 29, 13:47 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 02/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 02/07/2026 14:30 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
